creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
(The bot is stupid, assigning back to portmgr@ where general ports policy discussions belong.)

OTOH, looking at the exp-run logs with diizzy@ it seems that rawtherapee is the only 
obvious victim of the symbol unexport, so this is more a long-term strategy discussion, which will also see a broader context about supply chain security, trust, and all that in the wake of the xz backdoor disaster that struck the world in late March 2024.
